description_long: This is a rustic wooden spice rack featuring two horizontal shelves, each holding a row of round, cork-topped spice containers in various earthy colors such as red, yellow, green, brown, and white. The rack has a visibly aged, textured wood finish and includes two small drawers at the bottom, likely for additional storage. Each spice container is labeled with a small tag tied around its neck, though the writing is not clearly legible. The containers are arranged in a neat, grid-like pattern, maximizing the use of space on the shelves. The back and sides of the rack are solid wood panels, providing structural support and a classic, sturdy appearance. This spice rack would be suitable for placement on a kitchen countertop or in a pantry within an urban home.
description: A rustic wooden spice rack with two shelves, holding colorful, cork-topped spice containers and two small drawers at the base. The containers are neatly arranged in a grid pattern, each with a small label.
description_view_0: Front view showing all spice containers, their labels, and the two drawers at the bottom.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the rack and the protrusion of the spice containers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid wooden back panel with no visible containers or drawers.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the depth and partial profile of the containers.
